title: paspalum arsenei
intro: Paspalum arsenei, also known as Arsene's paspalum, is a type of tropical grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Paspalum arsenei include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Paspalum arsenei can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
